---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(vegan)
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(DESeq2)
library(reshape2)
library(emmeans)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
```


```{r}
ps1 = readRDS("/Preprocessing/ps1_AlphaDiv_02182026.RDS")


ps1.clean <- prune_samples(sample_sums(ps1) > 8000, ps1)
ps1.clean <- subset_samples(ps1.clean, Soil_type.x != "Sterile")

```


```{r}
singleton_counts <- taxa_sums(ps1.clean) == 1
table(singleton_counts)
# TRUE = singletons, FALSE = non-singletons
```
We have 8051 ASVs that are singletons vs 13 that are not. 


**Function to calculate Alpha Diversity:**
```{r}
alpha_div <- estimate_richness(ps1.clean, measures = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon", "Simpson"))
head(alpha_div)
```


```{r}

# 4. Merge with sample metadata (optional)
alpha_div$SampleID <- rownames(alpha_div)
alpha_div <- merge(alpha_div, data.frame(sample_data(ps1.clean)), by.x = "SampleID", by.y = "row.names")



```


```{r}
# 6. Plot for Shannon, Chao, and observed richness

ps1.clean_i1 = subset_samples(ps1.clean, Iteration == 1)
comparisons <- list(
  c("A", "C"),
  c("A", "M"),
  c("C", "M")
)


Plot_i1 = plot_richness(ps1.clean_i1, measures = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon"), x = "Clade") +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Clade),
    width = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.75,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    size = 2.2,
    alpha = 0.85,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~variable,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = labeller(variable = c(
      Observed = "Observed ASVs",
      Chao1    = "Chao1 Richness",
      Shannon  = "Shannon Diversity"
    ))
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    A = "Andigenum",
    C = "Chiletanum",
    M = "N. American"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Alpha Diversity",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  ) + 
    stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = comparisons,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    p.adjust.method = "BH",
    label = "p.signif",
    step.increase = 0.08
  )

Plot_i1
```


```{r}
library(ggpubr)

ps1.clean_i5 = subset_samples(ps1.clean, Iteration == 5)
Plot_i5 = plot_richness(ps1.clean_i5, measures = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon"), x = "Clade") +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Clade),
    width = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.75,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    size = 2.2,
    alpha = 0.85,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~variable,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = labeller(variable = c(
      Observed = "Observed ASVs",
      Chao1    = "Chao1 Richness",
      Shannon  = "Shannon Diversity"
    ))
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    A = "Andigenum",
    C = "Chiletanum",
    M = "N. American"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Alpha Diversity",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  ) + 
    stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = comparisons,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    p.adjust.method = "BH",
    label = "p.signif",
    step.increase = 0.08
  )


Plot_i5
```


```{r}
library(cowplot)

combined_plot <- plot_grid(Plot_i1, Plot_i5, labels = c("A", "B"), nrow = 2)
combined_plot

#ggsave("Figure_1.pdf", combined_plot, width = 12, height = 10) #At ASV level. 
```



***

*** misc *** 

Let's try calculating Faith's PD since we have built a phylogeny Tree. 

```{r}
library(ape)

library(phyloseq)

# Extract taxa names
otu_taxa <- taxa_names(ps1.clean)
tree_taxa <- phy_tree(ps1.clean)$tip.label

# Check overlap
length(intersect(otu_taxa, tree_taxa))
length(otu_taxa)  # total OTUs in your phyloseq object
length(tree_taxa) # total tips in your tree

phy_tree(ps1.clean)
is.rooted(phy_tree(ps1.clean))
```


```{r}
library(picante)

# Convert OTU table to matrix
otu_mat <- as(otu_table(ps1.clean), "matrix")

# Ensure OTUs are rows
if(taxa_are_rows(ps1.clean)) {
  otu_mat <- t(otu_mat)
}

# Compute Faith's PD
pd_res <- pd(otu_mat, phy_tree(ps1.clean), include.root = TRUE)

# Add PD to sample metadata
sample_data(ps1.clean)$Faith_PD <- pd_res$PD

# Add to sample metadata
sample_data(ps1.clean)$Faith_PD <- pd_res$PD

# Check results
head(sample_data(ps1.clean)$Faith_PD)
```


```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 4. Compute other alpha diversity metrics (Chao1, Shannon)
# ----------------------------
rich_df <- estimate_richness(ps1.clean_i5, measures = c("Chao1", "Shannon"))

# Drop standard error columns (se.chao1)
rich_df <- rich_df[, c("Chao1", "Shannon")]

# Add Faith's PD
rich_df$Faith_PD <- sample_data(ps1.clean_i5)$Faith_PD

# ----------------------------
# 5. Add metadata for plotting
# ----------------------------
meta_df <- data.frame(sample_data(ps1.clean_i5))
rich_df$SampleID <- rownames(rich_df)
rich_df$Treatment <- meta_df$Clade[match(rownames(rich_df), rownames(meta_df))]

# Convert to long format for ggplot
rich_long <- melt(rich_df, id.vars = c("SampleID", "Treatment"), 
                  variable.name = "Metric", value.name = "Value")

# ----------------------------
# 6. Plot alpha diversity
# ----------------------------
ggplot(rich_long, aes(x = Treatment, y = Value, fill = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 1.5) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  ylab("Alpha Diversity") +
  xlab("Treatment") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```
